title: Update icon images at three XPath locations based on uploaded names

requirements.text: Replace the icon image at XPath '/html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div[8]/img[1]' with the uploaded 'Multiple Server Icon.png' image

quotes: change image of the icons based on there names

acceptanceCriteria: The icon at the specified XPath displays the uploaded Multiple Server Icon.png image
The image is properly sized and rendered in the attack path diagram

requirements.text: Replace the icon image at XPath '/html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div[9]/img[1]' with the uploaded 'Command and Control.png' image

quotes: change image of the icons based on there names

acceptanceCriteria: The icon at the specified XPath displays the uploaded Command and Control.png image
The image is properly sized and rendered in the attack path diagram

requirements.text: Replace the icon image at XPath '/html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div[19]/img[1]' with the uploaded 'Domain.png' image

quotes: change image of the icons based on there names

acceptanceCriteria: The icon at the specified XPath displays the uploaded Domain.png image
The image is properly sized and rendered in the attack path diagram

constraints: Only modify the three specific icon elements identified by the provided XPath expressions
Use the exact uploaded image files: 'Multiple Server Icon.png', 'Command and Control.png', and 'Domain.png'
Preserve existing drag-and-drop functionality and icon placement behavior
nonGoals: Modifying any other icon images not specified by the XPath expressions
Changing icon rendering logic or canvas behavior
Adding new icon types to the toolbar
